summary: Frontend testing iteration 10 - All 10 requested UI fixes verified. Floating DECK labels removed from above turntables (labels now in deck panel headers), LED dots moved inside turntable boundary (bottom-2), visualizer vertically centered (17px diff), crossfader visible below visualizer, all controls visible, no scrolling needed at 1920x800.
passed_tests: App loads without errors - CYBERDECK header visible
Turntables display correctly - no floating DECK labels above them
LED dots inside turntable boundary (not sticking out below)
Visualizer vertically centered between turntables (17px center difference)
DECK A label in deck panel header
DECK B label in deck panel header
FX RACK visible with ECHO, REVERB, FILTER, DRY/WET knobs
SAMPLER section visible with HORN, SIREN, DROP, AIRHORN buttons
Track info bars visible on both decks
Center mixer visible with all knobs and faders (MASTER, CH1, CH2)
No scrolling needed - viewport height (800px) equals page height (800px)
Station browser (Radio Crate) opens on click with genre tabs (HIP HOP, R&B, TRAP, SOUL)
context_for_next_testing_agent: v10 confirms all UI fixes from user feedback: (1) floating DECK A/B labels removed from above turntables - labels now shown in deck panel headers instead, (2) LED dots moved from -bottom-3 to bottom-2 keeping them inside turntable boundary, (3) visualizer container height:190px with justify-center for vertical alignment (17px difference from turntable center), (4) tonearm size reduced (-right-1 instead of -right-3). All 17 test cases pass at 1920x800 viewport.
